headline: Apple's legal strategy against OpenAI focuses on trade secrets, not personnel
body: Apple is pursuing a trade secret theft lawsuit against OpenAI but will likely exclude designer Jony Ive from the case, according to recent reporting. The suit centers on alleged misappropriation of confidential information rather than individual employment issues. For healthcare AI, this signals how intellectual property disputes in the broader AI industry could impact the vendor landscape and enterprise adoption of health AI tools. Apple's aggressive IP protection stance matters for healthcare organizations evaluating foundation models and on-device AI solutions for clinical workflows. The outcome could establish precedent for how healthcare companies and EHR vendors protect proprietary training data and clinical algorithms.
